title: Cause
description: A Cause is what initiates a Capability — either from a user, an external system, or the passage of time. Causes are the entry point to all behavior.

capability.description: The Capability this cause initiates, expressed as Noun.Verb.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of what initiates this cause.

schedule.description: A cron expression defining when the cause fires. Required when source is 'schedule'.

event.description: The webhook event name that fires this cause. Required when source is 'webhook'.

after.description: The Capability whose completion fires this cause. Required when source is 'capability'.

condition.description: An optional condition that must be true at cause time for the capability to be initiated.
